violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be washed rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of clean knives on the knife rack were observed with an accumulation of food and debris/residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were set for thorough cleaning/sanitizing at the 3 bay sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Chlorine sanitizer solution used in sanitizer buckets was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer bucket was adjusted to the proper level of 50-100 ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The bar ice scoop was observed being stored in with juice pourers in the ice well between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. At the time of inspection, a clean shaker cup was put in place for storage of the ice scoop between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
